steps: Log in to your Sanity account or sign up at https://www.sanity.io/login
Select your project from the project list
Click on 'Settings' in the left sidebar
Click on 'API' under the Settings section
Scroll to the 'Tokens' section and click 'Add new token'
Enter a descriptive label for the token
Select the permission level: 'Viewer', 'Editor', or 'Deploy Studio'
Copy the token immediately — it is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Sanity robot token. Sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

notes: Free tier (Developer plan) includes 2 projects, 10GB bandwidth, and 500k API requests/month
Token is shown only once at creation time — copy it before closing
You also need your Project ID and Dataset name (found in project settings or manage.sanity.io)
Use the 'Editor' role for read/write access; 'Viewer' for read-only
Organization-level tokens can be created at the organization level in manage.sanity.io

test_endpoint.description: List accessible Sanity projects to verify the token is valid
